completed_tasks.name: Project initialization (PROJECT.md, REQUIREMENTS.md, ROADMAP.md, STATE.md, config.json, gemini.md, prompt-log.md)

remaining_tasks.name: Phase 1: Public route group + homepage rebuild

blockers.description: csmc-website-redesign-spec.md (the general UX spec) was not found in the repo — only the adaptation instructions doc is present
blockers.workaround: Requirements were derived from csmc-adaptation-instructions.md alone; work can proceed but verify with user if general spec adds missing requirements

human_actions_pending.action: Locate and add csmc-website-redesign-spec.md to the repository if it exists
human_actions_pending.context: User referenced this file in the /gsd-new-project prompt but it was not found during search

decisions.decision: csnmahanagarpalika/ is the Git root for all planning commits
decisions.rationale: .git resides inside csnmahanagarpalika/, not the outer CSMC folder

decisions.decision: Marathi (mr.json) replaces Hindi (hi.json) as the default locale
decisions.rationale: Target audience is Marathi-speaking citizens of Chhatrapati Sambhajinagar

decisions.decision: All phases use MVP mode (vertical slices)
decisions.rationale: Delivers working end-to-end user capability each phase rather than building horizontal layers
Current app is login-first; unauthenticated route group must exist before any redesign page can land

next_action: Run /gsd-discuss-phase 1 or /gsd-plan-phase 1 to start the (public) route group and homepage rebuild
context_notes: Session was purely setup/planning — codebase mapped, project initialized, 8-phase roadmap committed. No feature code was written. The repo uses Next.js 14 App Router with Firebase. The critical architectural insight is that the app currently has no unauthenticated route group — that is Phase 1's entire job.
